title: Minimal demo (mock RTC)
description: Connect mock RTC, set an optional job label, load the minimal demo job, run and stop. Matches backend routes under /api/v1/jobs/minimal-demo.

steps.title: RTC session
steps.description: Establish a mock RTC session through the backend (no scanner hardware).

steps.title: Job parameters
steps.description: Optional label passed when registering the minimal demo job.

steps.title: Load job
steps.description: Register the minimal demo job with the RTC session.

steps.title: Run control
steps.description: Start or stop execution of the loaded job.

steps.title: RTC status
steps.description: Poll backend RTC status (connection state and mock execution state).
